title: Izzy's Maces
description: Makes the Mace craftable with different materials, giving access to 5 new variants!
body:
# Izzy's Maces

This datapack adds 6 new mace variants, including weaker and stronger ones!


<details>
<summary>Club</summary>

## Crafting Recipe

![A crafting recipe showing a Chiseled Stone Bricks block and a Stick under it, resulting in the Club item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edd6b7c03e2d7d6eee03887a15a4f65a6b745627.png)


## Funcionality

The Club is a weaker version of the mace, and easier to obtain as well. The Club cannot be enchanted and does not cause a smash attack as well, it only has the damage increase per fallen block feature, however, it's able to temporarialy disable foes' shields.

It has 250 durability points and deals 5 damage per melee attack, with a 0.6 attack speed.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Blazing Mace</summary>

## Crafting Recipe

![A crafting recipe showing a Heavy Core block and a Blaze Rod under it, resulting in the Blazing Mace item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba9a562dd7daa206d9fc3792bd84687a41f2011a.png)


## Funcionality

The Blazing Mace is a fiery version of the mace, it has all of the same features as a regular mace, but with a slight twist. After performing a smash attack, it will cause a fiery explosion on the target, dealing fire damage to nearby foes.

It has regular mace stats, 500 durability, 6 damage per melee attack and a 0.6 attack speed.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Gravity Mace</summary>

## Crafting Recipe

![A crafting recipe showing a Heavy Core block and an End Rod under it, resulting in the Gravity Mace item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2591621d2dc1cbf8b43867a586fefc3efea9e6a5.png)


## Funcionality

The Gravity Mace is an ender version of the mace, it has all of the same features as a regular mace, but with a slight twist. After performing a smash attack, it applies levitation for a few seconds to nearby entities and to the attacker.

It has regular mace stats, 500 durability, 6 damage per melee attack and a 0.6 attack speed.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Lightning Mace</summary>

## Crafting Recipe

![A crafting recipe showing a Heavy Core block and a Lightning Rod under it, resulting in the Lightning Mace item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/433b6b8a956312a6a8d4c9249e2256b02ede6a60.png)


## Funcionality

The Lightning Mace is an electric version of the mace, it has all of the same features as a regular mace, but with a slight twist. After performing a smash attack, it strikes a lightning bolt on the targeted entity.

It has regular mace stats, 500 durability, 6 damage per melee attack and a 0.6 attack speed.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Netherite Mace</summary>

## Crafting Recipe

![A smithing recipe showing a Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template and, a Mace a Netherite Ingot, resulting in the Netherite Mace item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9edbbe1ef24e0a5ac4ee6b9727f2d9767c0915b.png)


## Funcionality

The Netherite Mace is just a stronger and more durable version of the mace, it has all of the same features as a regular mace, except it deals more damage. Its damage per fallen block parameter is increased, which means it deals more damage for each block you fall.

It has 825 durability points and deals 7.5 damage per melee attack, with a 0.4 attack speed.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Quarterstaff</summary>

## Crafting Recipe

![A crafting recipe showing two Heavy Cores, one at the top right corner and the other at the bottom left, and a Breeze Rod under it, resulting in the Quarterstaff item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b8b29dcec79a0667d0008ee8ddec368ae7a8ee2.png)


## Funcionality

The Quarterstaff is like a mace, but doubled, it has all of the same features as a regular mace, exept it deals more damage. Upon hitting an entity with a smash attack, the holder will have a second of strength as a combo. Smash attacks also have a slightly larger area of impact.

It has 985 durability points and deals 7 damage per melee attack, with a 0.5 attack speed.

</details>


## Compatibility

In the most recent version of the datapack, no incompatibilities have been found yet.


## Translations

Currently, the datapack is available to the following languages:
- English
- Spanish (Español)
- Portuguese (Português)
